title: Better Food PlusS
description: This Texture Pack add realistic textures to the food
body:
# BETTER FOOD PLUS
##  ENGLISH

Tired of boring fruit textures?

This texture pack adds new textures to all Minecraft fruits, since their old textures were boring. Change the texture of apple, golden apple, notch, carrot, watermelon, milk and more...



  By @d_de_diego_d
## 
## ESPAÑOL

¿Cansado de las texturas aburridas de las frutas?

Este pack de texturas añade nuevas texturas a todas las frutas de minecraft, ya que sus antiguas texturas eran aburridas. Cambia la textura de la manzana, la manzana de oro, la notch, la zanahoria, la sandia, la leche y mas...



By @d_de_diego_d
